summary: Frontend testing of 10 GO page feature fixes with logged-in user (dipali@clubconcierge.in / Mojo as active pet). All 10 features pass. Go page fully functional with teal pill-tab navigation, personalized hero, inline DimExpanded panels, and complete PetFriendlyStays search.

minor.issue: Returns 'No results in Goa' on Find a Stay tab (known issue from iteration_165, still present)

issues: Drawer opens but 'has_questions=False, has_complete=False' - questions may load slowly (spinner shown). Soul score shown as '—%' until API returns. Low priority, pre-existing issue from iteration_165.

tests_passed: TEST 1 PASS: GoHero shows 'for Mojo' heading format (H1 = 'for Mojo') - matches Care/Dine style
TEST 2 PASS: GoCategoryStrip renders exactly 6 pills (Safety, Calming, Carriers, Feeding, Health & Docs, Stay & Board) at ~72px height - proper spacing, not squashed
TEST 3 PASS: Tab bar shows 3 centered pill buttons with border-radius:9999 - 'Go Essentials', 'Find a Stay', 'Book a Service' - NOT underline tabs

TEST 4 PASS: Find a Stay tab shows PetFriendlyStays with destination search pre-filled 'Goa' (Mojo's city), popular chips (Goa, Coorg, Bali, Paris, London), type filter pills (Hotels, Resorts, Homestays, Boarding, Camping)
TEST 5 PASS: TripProfile compact bar shows Indie (breed) + Goa (city) + Chicken (allergy) chips - NOT empty
TEST 6 PASS: TripProfile drawer opens, shows 'GROW MOJO'S TRIP PROFILE', score display with %, close button works
TEST 7 PASS: Clicking dimension card opens DimExpanded inline panel (NOT a modal - no position:fixed). Safety panel shows 231 products with Mira quote and tabs
TEST 8 PASS: Go Essentials tab does NOT contain 'Go, Personally' / GoConcierge section

TEST 9 PASS: Book a Service tab shows 'Go, Personally' section with all 8 illustration service cards (Flight Coordination, Road & Train Travel, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Relocation, Pet Taxi, Travel Planning, Emergency Travel)
TEST 10 PASS: GuidedGoPaths renders path cards with expand/collapse - clicking 'Weekend Getaway Path' shows 'PATH STEPS' with numbered steps and 'Start this path with Mira' button
design_observations: Tab bar correctly positioned: y=595 (below hero y=196 and category strip y=506)
GoHero does NOT contain tab bar - tabs are separate GoTabBar component rendered below GoCategoryStrip
Category pill heights: 72-73px - proper sizing, not squashed
TripProfile compact bar: clean layout with teal-styled chips for breed/city/allergy
Book a Service cards use illustration-style colored gradient backgrounds (not plain text cards)
GuidedGoPaths path cards show color-coded banner images with emoji icons - matches Care page style
DimExpanded inline panel shows teal color scheme with Mira quote box, product count, close button
action_items: KNOWN ISSUE (pre-existing): Find a Stay shows 'No results in Goa' - backend places API returning empty for Goa. See iteration_165 for RCA.
LOW: TripProfile drawer soul score shows '—%' on initial open (before API returns liveScore). Pre-existing issue.
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 feature requirements implemented correctly. No new critical code issues found.
GoSoulPage.jsx: GoConcierge component is correctly moved to services tab only (line 1732) - Go Essentials tab no longer contains it
GoTabBar: Correct pill style implementation with border-radius:9999 and linear-gradient for active state
DimExpanded: Correctly renders inline (no position:fixed) inside the page grid with gridColumn:'1 / -1' span
PetFriendlyStays: Pre-fills search with pet's city (petCity) on mount - working correctly
TripProfile: All 3 chip types (breed, city, allergy) correctly render from pet data
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 with Mojo as active pet (soul_score: 95%, breed: Indie, allergy: Chicken, city: Goa)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 GO page feature fixes tested and confirmed passing. Features: GoHero 'for Mojo' heading, 6 category pills, 3 pill tabs (GoTabBar), PetFriendlyStays with search/chips, TripProfile compact bar (non-empty with Indie+Goa+Chicken), TripProfile drawer, DimExpanded inline, Go Personally removed from Essentials tab, Book a Service tab has illustration cards, GuidedGoPaths expand/collapse. Test credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Login → pet-home (wait 4s) → /go (wait 5s) for proper pet context loading.
